description: ERock, Inc. designs, deploys, sells, operates, and maintains distributed power generation systems designed to provide power for commercial and industrial customers in the United States. Its offerings include the design, installation, and operation of modular power systems, as well as ongoing operations and maintenance and asset management services. Its systems support a range of customer applications, including bridge power, backup power, and dispatchable power solutions. The company primarily serves data centers, utilities, and commercial and industrial customers across the United States. The
